---
title: "INEG 2314H — Statistical Methods"
---

# Statistical Methods Wiki + Coding Dojo

A living resource for university-level statistical methods in industrial engineering.

This site combines:

- a structured **statistics wiki** organized by the CPS framework (Construct → Procedure → Script)
- **executable Quarto lessons** with prose, math, and R code
- **R-based coding drills** for technical fluency
- **concept backlinks** for graph-based exploration
- a **suggested linear learning path** through the course

---

## How to Use This Resource

### Follow the Linear Path

Use the linear path if you want a course-like sequence through the material.

[Linear Path →](syllabus-path.qmd)

### Explore the Knowledge Graph

Use the wiki and backlinks if you want to move by conceptual relationship instead of chapter order.

[Knowledge Graph Navigation →](graph-navigation.qmd)

### Practice in the Coding Dojo

Use the dojo when you want to run R code, modify examples, and build technical fluency.

[Coding Dojo →](dojo/index.qmd)

### Browse the Wiki

Search or browse the full concept index.

[Wiki Index →](wiki/index.md)

---

## Course Coverage

| Section | Topics |
|---------|--------|
| 1–2 | Sampling, probability, distributions, CI, hypothesis testing, chi-square, proportions |
| 3 | Regression (SLR, MLR), control charts, process capability |
| 4 | CRD, RCBD, factorial ANOVA, 2^k factorial design |
